title: ARC-Challenge
description: Evolve the editable solver independently for each ARC-Challenge validation multiple-choice reasoning question.
baseline_summary: A placeholder dataset-level solver template that returns the first available answer choice.

objective_spec.summary_template: Higher accuracy is better across independently evolved ARC-Challenge question runs.

prompt_context: Edit editable.py only. The entry symbol solve(question: dict) must return the best answer string for the current ARC-Challenge reasoning question.
